intro: At 23:40, writer Lin was found unconscious in the archive room. Kari must uncover who altered the manuscript and why.

suspects.name: Ivy
suspects.alibi: Claims she stayed in the lobby all night.

suspects.name: Noah
suspects.motive: Wanted to expose plagiarism in the manuscript.
suspects.alibi: Says he was fixing stage lights at 23:30.

suspects.name: Rin
suspects.alibi: Claims she never entered the archive room.

clues.title: Broken Bulb
clues.desc: A shattered bulb was found near the archive switchboard.

clues.title: Ink Stain
clues.desc: Fresh blue ink appears on a maintenance glove.

clues.title: Lobby Camera Gap
clues.desc: The lobby camera skipped 10 minutes during the incident.
